amulet.Name: Amuleto
amulet.Description: Converte uma parte da cura em escudo quando a vida do usu

ankh.Name: Ankh
ankh.Description: An ancient relic.<n/>When destroyed, will teleport the flower back to where it was destroyed.

ant_egg.Name: Egg
ant_egg.Description: Something interesting might pop out of this.

antennae.Name: Antennae
antennae.Description: Permite que sua flor veja inimigos mais distantes.

bandage.Name: Bandagem
bandage.Description: Turns the flower <c val="{#Colors/undead}">Undead</c> for a limited time on death.<n/>Delays death until expiration.<n/>Flower <c val="{#Colors/damage}">Body Damage</c> is reduced during this period.<n/>Prevents revival for some time afterwards.

basic.Name: Basic
basic.Description: A nice petal, not too strong but not too weak.

battery.Name: Battery
battery.Description: Discharges electricity whenever the flower gets hit.

bean.Name: Bean
bean.Description: Deals more damage if there are no allied flowers around you.

beetle_egg.Name: Egg
beetle_egg.Description: Something interesting might pop out of this.

blood_stinger.Name: Stinger
blood_stinger.Description: It really hurts, but it's very fragile.<n/>Deals damage to self when spawned.

blueberries.Name: Blueberries
blueberries.Description: It goes poof. Now with the extra secret ingredient: lightning.

bone.Name: Bone
bone.Description: Resistente. Perde metade da armadura a cada impacto.

broccoli.Name: Broccoli
broccoli.Description: Explodes when it hits something. For reasons unknown.

bulb.Name: Bulb
bulb.Description: A shiny lightbulb. Draws aggro from mobs.

bur.Name: Capim
bur.Description: Decreases armor of affected unit. Does not stack with itself.

cactus.Name: Cactus
cactus.Description: Not very strong, but somehow increases your maximum health.

card.Name: Carta
card.Description: Uma carta de baralho. Provavelmente marcada.

carrot.Name: Cenoura
carrot.Description: Sturdy and reliable. Can be shot and bounces off walls.

champion_crown.Name: Crown
champion_crown.Description: Gives flowers around you a {#Rarities/super/NameColored} {#Petals/basic/FullName}.<n/>You receive credit for damage dealt using it.

claw.Name: Garra
claw.Description: Deals extra damage if the victim is above 80% health.<n/>-50% damage vs other flowers.

clay.Name: Argila
clay.Description: It sticks to dust in the air to get bigger and stronger.

coin.Name: Moeda
coin.Description: The power of capitalism compels you!

compass.Name: Compass
compass.Description: This crappy thing might be able to find something interesting...

coral.Name: Coral
coral.Description: Breaks apart on impact.<n/>Each piece has 50% of the stats of the predecessor.

corn.Name: Milho
corn.Description: Leva bastante tempo para carregar, mas possui muita vida.

corruption.Name: Corruption
corruption.Description: Corrupts one's soul, turning them against their own kind.

cotton.Name: Cotton
cotton.Description: Absorbs damage taken by the flower.

cutter.Name: Cortador
cutter.Description: A friend used to own this... now it's time for revenge.<n/>Increases body damage.

dahlia.Name: Dahlia
dahlia.Description: Uma pequena quantidade de cura, mas bastante consistente.

dandelion.Name: Dandelion
dandelion.Description: Its interesting properties inhibits healing effects on affected units.<n/>Affected units have their healing reduced by 20%. Stacks with itself.

dead_leaf.Name: Folha
dead_leaf.Description: Increases petal health but makes them reload slower.

dice.Name: Dice
dice.Description: Possui 5% de chance de causar 35x dano.<n/>As chances aumentam em 4% por cada ponto em sorte.

disc.Name: Disco
disc.Description: Reduces damage taken from collisions with mobs and flowers.

domino.Name: Domino
domino.Description: Damage depends on how many dots it has.

dust.Name: Poeira
dust.Description: Sometimes it sticks together, sometimes it doesn't.

electric_web.Name: Teia
electric_web.Description: It's a little less sticky, but a bit more shocking.

fang.Name: Presa
fang.Description: Heals based on damage dealt by this petal.

faster.Name: Acelerador
faster.Description: It's so light it makes your other petals spin faster.

glass.Name: Glass
glass.Description: Phases through enemies.<n/>Cannot damage enemies more often than a certain interval.

golden_leaf.Name: Folha
golden_leaf.Description: A very special leaf, seems to allow you to use your other petals even more.

grapes.Name: Grapes
grapes.Description: It goes poof. Now with a secret ingredient: poison.

heavy.Name: Pesado
heavy.Description: This thing is so heavy that nothing gets in the way.<n/>Slows down petal rotation speed when equipped.

honey.Name: Honey
honey.Description: Mobs love this. Attracts them in a large radius.<n/>Mobs will prioritize this over flowers.<n/>Affected units develop immunity to its effects after some time.

iris.Name: Iris
iris.Description: Muito venenoso, mas leva um tempo para fazer o seu trabalho.<n/>-50% dano contra outras flores.

leaf.Name: Folha
leaf.Description: Gathers energy from the sun to heal your flower passively.

light.Name: Light
light.Description: Weaker than most petals, but recharges very quickly.

lotus.Name: Lotus
lotus.Description: Absorbs poison damage taken by the flower.

magic_cotton.Name: Cotton
magic_cotton.Description: Absorbs damage taken by the flower.

magic_eye.Name: Magic Eye
magic_eye.Description: Consumes half the current mana and deals damage based on that value.

magic_leaf.Name: Folha
magic_leaf.Description: Gathers mana from the environment passively.

magic_missile.Name: Missile
magic_missile.Description: You can actually shoot this one... with magic.

magic_stick.Name: Stick
magic_stick.Description: A mysterious stick that summons the forces of the wind... with magic.

magic_stinger.Name: Stinger
magic_stinger.Description: It really hurts, but it's very fragile.

mark.Name: Marca
mark.Description: A dark mark that binds itself to a fallen soul.

mecha_antennae.Name: Antennae
mecha_antennae.Description: Allows your flower to sense foes farther away.<n/>And it has a blinking red light on top.

mimic.Name: Mimic
mimic.Description: Copies the petal to the left of this, with the same rarity as this.

missile.Name: Missile
missile.Description: You can actually shoot this one.

monstera.Name: Monstera
monstera.Description: Cura flores ao seu redor.<n/>O efeito se torna mais fraco conforme

moon.Name: Moon
moon.Description: This thing is so big your petals orbit it instead.<n/>Where did you find this anyway?

nazar.Name: Nazar
nazar.Description: When the flower receives damage, reduces it by 98% and consumes a charge.

pearl.Name: Pearl
pearl.Description: Just drop it off somewhere and use your kinetic powers so you don't lose it.

pharaoh_crown.Name: Crown
pharaoh_crown.Description: Invoca Besouros <c val="{#Colors/undead}">Zumbi</c> para lutar ao seu lado.

pincer.Name: Pincer
pincer.Description: Debilitates enemies temporarily, reducing their movement speed.

plank.Name: Plank
plank.Description: Does 20x damage vs projectiles and petals.

poo.Name: Poo
poo.Description: Faz os bichos terem menos vontade de atacar voc

powder.Name: Powder
powder.Description: Increases movement speed.<n/>Disabled if flower takes damage or if near a mob higher than a certain rarity.

privet.Name: Alfeneiro
privet.Description: Deals extra {#Attribute/PoisonNoColon} damage based on the existing {#Attribute/PoisonNoColon} damage per second.

relic.Name: Relic
relic.Description: A strange relic. Significantly increases maximum health.<n/>Damage taken is spread among other wearers.

rice.Name: Arroz
rice.Description: Spawns very quickly, but not very strong.

rock.Name: Pedra
rock.Description: Extremely durable, but takes a bit longer to recharge.

root.Name: Root
root.Description: Fornece uma camada de armadura adicional a cada intervalo, uma camada

rose.Name: Rose
rose.Description: Its healing properties are amazing. Not so good at combat though.

rubber.Name: Borracha
rubber.Description: Increases knockback received. Also absorbs lightning damage dealt to the flower.

sacrifice.Name: Sacrifice
sacrifice.Description: On death, summons a mob to fight again.<n/>Mob type depends on where the sacrifice happens.<n/>Cannot be used in low mob rarity areas.

salt.Name: Salt
salt.Description: Reflects some of the damage you take back to the enemy that dealt it.<n/>Higher rarity mobs have higher resistance to damage reflection.

shell.Name: Concha
shell.Description: Adds a temporary shield to yourself or allies.

shovel.Name: Shovel
shovel.Description: Becomes untargetable but unable to use petals for a limited time.

soil.Name: Soil
soil.Description: Increases health, but also increases flower size and decreases movement speed.

sponge.Name: Esponja
sponge.Description: Distribui o dano recebido pela flor ao longo do tempo.<n/>Se retirada, causa o dano total de uma vez.<n/>N

starfish.Name: Starfish
starfish.Description: Cura a sua flor enquanto estiver com a vida abaixo de 75%

stick.Name: Stick
stick.Description: A mysterious stick that summons the forces of the wind.

stinger.Name: Stinger
stinger.Description: It really hurts, but it's very fragile.

talisman.Name: Talisman
talisman.Description: A necklace that allows the wearer to anticipate enemy attacks.

third_eye.Name: Third Eye
third_eye.Description: Allows your flower to expand your petals further out.

tomato.Name: Tomato
tomato.Description: Fica mais forte conforme o tempo.

totem.Name: Totem
totem.Description: Grants health regen for a certain duration after killing a mob.

triangle.Name: Triangle
triangle.Description: Each copy of this petal equipped grants additional damage to it.

uranium.Name: Uranium
uranium.Description: Periodically releases radiation.<n/>-75% damage versus other flowers.<n/>Effect strength depends on distance to petal.

wax.Name: Cera
wax.Description: Don't ask where it came from.

yggdrasil.Name: Yggdrasil
yggdrasil.Description: A dried leaf from the Yggdrasil tree.<n/>Rumored to be able to bring the fallen back to life.

yin_yang.Name: Yin Yang
yin_yang.Description: This mysterious petal affects the rotation of your petals in unpredictable ways.

yucca.Name: Yucca
yucca.Description: Heals your flower but only while in the defensive position.
